descriptionText: Hanse 470e for sale 2008: Dive into the details of this well-maintained and reliable sailing yacht, available in Lefkada, Greece. This 14.3-meter cruiser is perfect for those who enjoy both racing and leisurely cruising. The Hanse 470e combines functionality with a comfortable living space, making it an ideal choice for families or group adventures.Key Specifications:Make: Hanse Model: 470e Year: 2008 Length Overall (LOA): 14 m 31 cm Beam: 4 m 46 cm Max Draft: 2 m 35 cm Condition: Used, in good condition Hull Material: Fiberglass Drive Type: Sail Drive Engine: Yanmar 4JH4T Engine Type: Inboard Diesel Power: 75 hp Engine Hours: 1287 Fuel Tanks: 1 x 250 l Stainless Steel Fresh Water Tanks: 2 x 200 l Stainless Steel Holding Tanks: 2 x 30 l Stainless Steel Guest Cabins: 3 Guest Heads: 2 Seating Capacity: 8 Max Passengers: 8 VAT: Paid (Greece) Location: Lefkada, GreeceThe Hanse 470e for sale 2008 features a thoughtfully designed layout that enhances comfort during long journeys. The yacht offers three guest cabins and two heads, allowing ample space for family and friends. The interior has been updated with new grey-beige upholstery, enhancing the overall aesthetic.The deck design stands out with a sleek flush foredeck, and the self-tacking jib ensures easy handling while sailing. The yacht also comes with significant upgrades for comfort and sustainability. It is equipped with:New Air Conditioning: 3 units of 20,000 BTU (2024) Solar Panels: 2 x 200W Watermaker: Ventura 200T (25 liters/hour) Generator: Whisper 3.2KW, only 181 hoursThese features emphasize the yacht's readiness for extended voyages. For safety and convenience, the Hanse 470e includes a range of electronics and navigation equipment, such as:Raymarine Radar E80 Raymarine GPS E80 Raymarine Autopilot ST6002 ICOM VHF Depthsounder Wind Speed and Direction instrumentsThe boat's exterior includes useful amenities like a bimini top, swim ladder, and teak sidedecks, which add to the overall practicality of the design. The cockpit is equipped with comfortable seating and a table for leisurely afternoons at anchor.This Hanse 470e for sale 2008 is a splendid option for anyone considering a cruising yacht in good condition. With all the necessary upgrades and a spacious design, it allows for pleasurable, hassle-free sailing. Whether you're planning weekend getaways or longer journeys throughout the Mediterranean, this yacht provides a robust platform with the amenities to keep you comfortable at sea.For more information or to schedule a viewing, please reach out. Don't miss this opportunity to own a well-respected yacht that blends performance and comfort seamlessly.
descriptionHtml:
Hanse 470e for sale 2008: Dive into the details of this well-maintained and reliable sailing yacht, available in Lefkada, Greece. This 14.3-meter cruiser is perfect for those who enjoy both racing and leisurely cruising. The Hanse 470e combines functionality with a comfortable living space, making it an ideal choice for families or group adventures.

Key Specifications:

Make: Hanse
Model: 470e
Year: 2008
Length Overall (LOA): 14 m 31 cm
Beam: 4 m 46 cm
Max Draft: 2 m 35 cm
Condition: Used, in good condition
Hull Material: Fiberglass
Drive Type: Sail Drive
Engine: Yanmar 4JH4T
Engine Type: Inboard Diesel
Power: 75 hp
Engine Hours: 1287
Fuel Tanks: 1 x 250 l Stainless Steel
Fresh Water Tanks: 2 x 200 l Stainless Steel
Holding Tanks: 2 x 30 l Stainless Steel
Guest Cabins: 3
Guest Heads: 2
Seating Capacity: 8
Max Passengers: 8
VAT: Paid (Greece)
Location: Lefkada, Greece

The Hanse 470e for sale 2008 features a thoughtfully designed layout that enhances comfort during long journeys. The yacht offers three guest cabins and two heads, allowing ample space for family and friends. The interior has been updated with new grey-beige upholstery, enhancing the overall aesthetic.

The deck design stands out with a sleek flush foredeck, and the self-tacking jib ensures easy handling while sailing. The yacht also comes with significant upgrades for comfort and sustainability. It is equipped with:

New Air Conditioning: 3 units of 20,000 BTU (2024)
Solar Panels: 2 x 200W
Watermaker: Ventura 200T (25 liters/hour)
Generator: Whisper 3.2KW, only 181 hours

These features emphasize the yacht's readiness for extended voyages. For safety and convenience, the Hanse 470e includes a range of electronics and navigation equipment, such as:

Raymarine Radar E80
Raymarine GPS E80
Raymarine Autopilot ST6002
ICOM VHF
Depthsounder
Wind Speed and Direction instruments

The boat's exterior includes useful amenities like a bimini top, swim ladder, and teak sidedecks, which add to the overall practicality of the design. The cockpit is equipped with comfortable seating and a table for leisurely afternoons at anchor.

This Hanse 470e for sale 2008 is a splendid option for anyone considering a cruising yacht in good condition. With all the necessary upgrades and a spacious design, it allows for pleasurable, hassle-free sailing. Whether you're planning weekend getaways or longer journeys throughout the Mediterranean, this yacht provides a robust platform with the amenities to keep you comfortable at sea.

For more information or to schedule a viewing, please reach out. Don't miss this opportunity to own a well-respected yacht that blends performance and comfort seamlessly.
